@obverse
1'. [AŠ x x x] x ud [...] 
2'. [x x x ] x e-em i#-na# na#-ak#-ka#-[ap-ti-šu ma-hi-iṣ? na-hi-id?]
3'. AŠ a#-wi#-[lu]m še-er-ha-nu ša qa₂-ti-š[u i-la-ku?]
4'. ma-ar-ṣu₂ šu-u₂ ša-[a-lim] 
5'. AŠ a-wi-[l]um še-er-ha-nu-šu# e-lu-tum u₃# [ša-ap-lu-tum]
6'. mi-it-ha-ri-iš ta-a-ku na-hi-°\°-[id]
7'. AŠ ki-i-ma ša qa₂-ti-šu-ma u₃ ša š[i-pi-šu i-la-ku na-hi-i]d
8'. AŠ ša qi₂#-ti#-šu i#-la-ku-u₂-ma ša š[i-pi-šu iš-pi-lu?]
9'. [š]a-ap-la#-nu#-um-ma mu#-ur-ṣu₂ i-ru-ub#-šum#-ma# n[a-hi-id]
10'. AŠ ša ši-[pi]-šu i-la-ku#-u₂-ma ša qa₂-ti-šu i[š-pi-lu?]
11'. e-le-nu-um-ma mu-ur-ṣu₂ i-ru-u[b-šu]m-ma na-h[i-id]
12'. AŠ še-er-ha-nu ša i-ir-ti-šu# u₃ na-ak-ka-ap-t[i-š]u 
13'. i-la-ku na-hi-id
14'. AŠ ša i-ir-ti-šu i-la-ku-u₂-ma ša na-ak-ka-ap-ti-š[u] / la i-la-ku ša-a-lim
15'. AŠ a-wi-lum re-eš li-ib-bi-šu pa!-ṭe₄-er na-hi-id
16'. AŠ a-wi-lum li-ib-bu-šu# na-ar-bu ša-a-lim
17'. AŠ a-wi-lum li-ib-bu-šu na-ap-hu I₃.DAB DINGIR.MAH 
18'. AŠ a-wi-lum ka-ap-pi i-ni-šu ik-bi-ru-u₂-ma
19'. u₃ i-na-šu di-im-tam i-na-an-di-a ši-bi-iṭ ša#-ri#-im#
20'. AŠ a-wi-lum pa-ga-ar-šu ka-ṣi-i-ma re-eš li-i[b-bi-šu]
21'. i#-la#-ak UG₇.E u₃ ṬI.LA 
22'. AŠ [a-wi]-lum ap-pa-at uz#-<ni>-šu ik-ta-na-ṣa-a mu-ru#-us#-[ṣu₂] i-ri-ik

@bottom
23'. ud#.6.kam ud#.7.kam mu-ru#-us#-su₂ i#-il#-la#-a[k]

@reverse
24'. [AŠ a-wi-lum qa₂]-aq-qa₂-as#-su₂# u₃ pa-ga-ar-šu [mi-it-ha-ri-iš?]
25'. i[k-t]a-na-aṣ-ṣa-[a] I₃#.DAB {d}MAŠ.TAB.[BA] 
26'. AŠ a-wi#-lum še-er-ha#-an# i#-ir-ti-šu ṭe-b[u-u₂-ma]
27'. u₃ tu#-qa₂-ar-mu-uh#-hi#-šu# ka-ṣi n[a-hi-id?]
#note: or @akk{I₃#.[DAB DN?]}
28'. AŠ ma-ar#-ṣu₂ pa-ri-id-ma# u₃# it-te-[x x x] I₃.DAB# li-l[i-i-im]
29'. AŠ ma-ar-ṣu₂# zu-mu-ur-šu i-mi-im-[ma i-ka-ṣi?] / u₃ ṣi-bi#-is-su₂ it-[t]a-na-ki-ir I₃-DAB# {d}[UT]U 
30'. AŠ ma-ar-ṣu₂ ka-li u₄#-mi-im na-pu-uš-ma
31'. iš-tu qi₂-id-da-at u₄-mi-im ka-li mu-ši-im ma-ru-uṣ / I₃#.DAB GIDIM.MA
32'. AŠ ma#-ar-ṣu₂ zu-mu-ur-šu mi-it-ha-ri-iš e-em
33'. uq#-qu₂-uq i-na zu-um-ri-šu qa₂-tum la i-ba-aš-ši
34'. hi-mi-iṭ# se#-e#-tim
35'. AŠ a#-wi-lim še-er-ha-an na-ak#-ka-ap-ti-šu ša i-mi-tim
36'. ṭe-bu-u₂ ša šu-me-lim ṭa#-a-ku u₃ re-eš li-ib-bi-šu
37'. na-p[i-i]h I₃.DAB ha-wi-i-tum
38'. AŠ ma-ar-ṣu₂ ku-nu-uk ki-ša-di-i-šu pa-ṭe-er
39'. še-er-ha-nu-šu ta-a-ku na-hi-ra-šu it-ta-na-aṣ-ba-ta# / na-hi-id
40'. AŠ ma#-ar-ṣu₂ i-na-šu da-ma-am! BI-ma-am ma-li-a
41'. [i-in]-šu ṣa-pi-ir u₃ ṣi-ib-tu-šu ta-a-ku
42'. [u₂-u]l i-ba-al-lu-uṭ
43'. [AŠ ma-a]r-ṣu₂ i-na-šu ga-al-ta ni#-ši# i-ni-šu pa-a[š-ra]
44'. [ki-ṣa]-al#-li-šu u₂-ka-am-x [x] x im šu x

$ obverse
1. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum ta-ar-ka-at#
#tr.en.(2): If the “eye-slit” is dark: the man will infringe on a taboo.
2. KU₃.AN a-wi-lum i-ša-ka-an
3. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum ta-ar#-ka-at#
#tr.en.(4): If the “eye-slit” is dark: people’s talk will become deranged.
4. pi-i ma-tim i-ša-an-ni
5. šum-ma na-ap-la#-aš-tum ki-ma i-ra-[a]t MUŠ i-ra-[sa₃]
#tr.en.(6): If the “eye-slit”’s “breast” (i.e., curvature) is like a snake’s scute: the king’s weapons will have no equal.
6. ka-ak šar-ri ma-hi-ra-am u₂-la i-šu-u₂#
7. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum du-pu-ra-at# ar#-bu-t[um]
#tr.en: If the “eye-slit” is absent: flight.
8. šum-ma na#-ap-la-aš-tum ši-ši-ta-am ha#-ar#-ma-at#
#tr.en.(9): If the “eye-slit” is covered by a film: a god’s curse has hold of the man.
9. ma-mi-it DINGIR a-wi-lam ṣa-ab-ta-at
10. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum ki-ma un-qi₂#-im ik-pu-up#-ma#
#tr.en.(12): If the “eye-slit” forms a circle like a ring and there is a cyst inside it: Adad and Ninurta will destroy the land’s bounty.
11. u₃# ze-hu-um i-na qa₂-ab-li-ša ša-ki-in
12. {d}IŠKUR u₃# {d}nin-urta hi-ši-ib ma-tim u₂#-[ha-l]a-qu₂#
$ end of side

$ reverse
13. [š]um-ma i-na li-bi na-ap-la-aš-tim
#tr.en.(15): If inside the “eye-slit” is present a weapon-mark (shaped) like a thorn: Adad will trample the army in battle.
14. ka-ak-kum ki#-i-ma ṣi-il-lim i-iz-za-az
15. {d}IŠKUR um-ma-nam i-na ta-ha-zi-im# i#-ra-hi-iṣ
16. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum ki-ma pa-da-nim pa-ar-ka#-[at]
#tr.en.(17): If the “eye-slit” lies obliquely like the “path”: the god [will make] the king’s allies or [auxiliaries(?) stronger(?)] than him.
17. DINGIR e-li šar-ri re-ṣi₂-šu u₃-lu [ti-la-ti-š]u₄? / [u₂-da-na-an?]
18. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum# ṣe-la#-ša p[a-ar-ka?]
#tr.en.(20): If the “eye-slit’s” flanks are [oblique(?):] the god will [raise] his arm against the king and put his army to flight.
19. DINGIR a-ah-šu# e#-li šar#-ri-im# i?#-[na-aš-ši?-m]a
20. um-ma-an-šu ar-bu-tam u₂-ša-la-ak
21. šum-ma na-ap-la-aš-tum a-na# ka-ak-ki#-im# iṭ-he#
#tr.en.(22): If the “eye-slit” draws near to a weapon-mark: the god will safeguard the man for good fortune.
22. DINGIR re-iš a-wi-lim a-na da-mi-iq#-tim# u₂#-ka#-a[l]
23. šum-ma i-na na-ap-la-aš-tim!(tum) <a-na?> li-bi pa-da-nim
#tr.en.(25): If from the “eye-slit” (toward?) the inside of the “path” a wish-mark is suspended: a delivery that is coming for the king.
24. e-ri-iš-tum ha-la-at ši-bu-ul-t[um]
25. ša a-na šar-ri-im i-la-kam
$ end of side

translation_content:
1-2 If the “eye-slit” is dark: the man will infringe on a taboo.
3-4 If the “eye-slit” is dark: people’s talk will become deranged.
5-6 If the “eye-slit”’s “breast” (i.e., curvature) is like a snake’s scute: the king’s weapons will have no equal.
7 If the “eye-slit” is absent: flight.
8-9 If the “eye-slit” is covered by a film: a god’s curse has hold of the man.
10-12 If the “eye-slit” forms a circle like a ring and there is a cyst inside it: Adad and Ninurta will destroy the land’s bounty.
13-15 If inside the “eye-slit” is present a weapon-mark (shaped) like a thorn: Adad will trample the army in battle.
16-17 If the “eye-slit” lies obliquely like the “path”: the god [will make] the king’s allies or [auxiliaries(?) stronger(?)] than him.
18-20 If the “eye-slit’s” flanks are [oblique(?):] the god will [raise] his arm against the king and put his army to flight.
21-22 If the “eye-slit” draws near to a weapon-mark: the god will safeguard the man for good fortune.
23-25 If from the “eye-slit” (toward?) the inside of the “path” a wish-mark is suspended: a delivery that is coming for the king.
